items.title: Novel Technique to Detect Cloud Threat Actor Operations
items.author: Nathaniel Quist
items.content: We introduce a novel method that maps cloud alert trends to MITRE ATT&CK techniques. The patterns created could identify threat actors by behavior.

The Shadow Campaigns: Uncovering Global Espionage
items.author: Unit 42
items.content: In 2025 a threat group compromised government and critical infrastructure in 37 countries, with reconnaissance in 155.

items.title: Broken Phishing URLs, (Thu, Feb 5th)
items.content: <article>For a few days, many phishing emails that landed into my mailbox contain strange URLs. They are classic emails asking you to open a document, verify your pending emails, …</article>
